articles.title: Temperatures are on the Rise. Heat Wave Inbound - KOTA Territory News
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Rajasthan
articles.full_text:
RAPID CITY, S.D. (KOTA) -
We saw a few storms through KOTA Territory today, but this looks to be the last bits of rainfall most of us see for the next week at least. Temperatures tomorrow are expected to rise up into the mid 90’s, with a few clouds but ample sunshine still as we look ahead to the weekend. Winds out of the south 10-20 mph.
This weekend, an incredible heat wave is expected to arrive. Cloud cover will be minimal during the following days, providing little if any shade. Saturday brings our first chance of reaching the triple digits for most of the area. Rapid City has a high of 100 with 100’s and high 90’s for the rest. Sunday is our hottest day, with highs anywhere from 101 to 108 expected across KOTA Territory. As we enter the work week, conditions aren’t improving much, with temperatures in the triple digits likely Monday through Thursday at least.
The heat shows no signs of ending next week, with our first day under the triple digits coming Thursday. A high of 99 is currently forecasted, but this far out that could definitely still change and go back up. Stay hydrated and indoors.
